scene_input.scene_summary: The boy resists the Evil One's temptation and chooses to walk away, feeling stronger and more confident.
scene_input.key_visual_action: The boy turning his back on the Evil One and walking away

schema_output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, p. 375
schema_output.moral_lesson: Resisting temptation and choosing the right path

characters.name: The Evil One
characters.appearance: tall, dark, imposing build, dressed in dark, tattered robes with a hood pulled over his head, his face twisted in a scowl

characters.name: Young Boy
characters.appearance: slender, youthful build, dressed in a simple white thobe with a brown woolen cloak draped over one shoulder, one hand extended in a determined gesture

schema_output.narrative_text: The young boy stood firm against the Evil One's tempting words, choosing to walk away and feel stronger and more confident.
schema_output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor storybook illustration, soft warm hand-painted style for ages 6-12. A dark, narrow 7th century Makkah alleyway with rough stone walls and a packed-earth floor. Late evening darkness with only a sliver of moonlight illuminating the scene from above. In the foreground, two figures stand facing each other: on the left, the tall, dark figure seen from the side, dressed in dark, tattered robes with a hood pulled over his head, his face twisted in a scowl, one hand extended in a tempting gesture; on the right, the young woman seen entirely from behind: slender, youthful build, dressed in a simple white thobe with a brown woolen cloak draped over one shoulder, one hand extended in a determined gesture, turning to walk away. Soft blue and purple night sky with the alleyway's dark stone walls as a color anchor. Medium shot at eye level. No modern objects, historically accurate 7th century scene.
